name: Chin State (Myanmar)
description: Flag of Chin State, with horizontal blue and green bands and a state seal in the centre featuring a hornbill, a sacred mountain (Khaw Nu Soum / Mount Victoria), and crossed implements.
history: Used by the Chin State government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the flag of Chin State, with horizontal blue and green bands and a state seal in the centre featuring a hornbill, a sacred mountain (Khaw Nu Soum / Mount Victoria), and crossed implements
